overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city center. The clip begins in a covered arcade, exits onto a wide plaza with towering holographic advertisements, waits at a busy intersection for futuristic vehicles to pass, then continues along a downtown sidewalk with pedestrians and towering skyscrapers.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open futuristic plaza with large holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking out from a covered arcade entrance into a bright open plaza, moving toward the street

entered.detail: green-framed doorway leading from indoor arcade to outdoor plaza
tall vertical holographic billboard displaying a character in fighting pose with purple and orange neon accents
wide open paved area surrounded by towering skyscrapers with digital signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered commercial walkway with neon signs visible outside. The camera moves forward through a green door frame, transitioning from the sheltered interior to a bright, open plaza. A massive vertical holographic advertisement tower dominates the right side of the view as the player emerges into the futuristic cityscape.

events.description: approaches crosswalk and slows to wait for traffic
white sedan and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the edge of a yellow-striped crosswalk for vehicles to clear the intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing marked with red WAIT text
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a wide urban intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. The camera stops at the curb to wait for traffic as a white sedan passes by. The vertical advertisement tower is now visible on the left side of the frame, having moved from the right as the player advanced. The scene is brightly lit with sharp shadows cast across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with multiple vehicle lanes

events.description: gold-colored luxury sedan drives past from left to right
silver Mizutani sports car approaches and turns at the intersection
camera turns right to follow the silver sports car as it drives away

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection observing the futuristic traffic, then turning to watch a silver sports car maneuver through the turn

notable_agents.action: silver Mizutani sports car with gold stripes turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: metallic gold four-door sedan with black trim driving through the intersection
low-profile silver sports car with Mizutani branding and gold alloy wheels
elevated monorail or highway structure spanning between skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection, including a prominent gold sedan and a sleek silver Mizutani sports car. The camera tracks the silver car as it makes a turn, revealing more of the elevated transit structures overhead. The environment features towering glass buildings with neon accents and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial sidewalk with retail storefronts

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall glass tower and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past commercial buildings, briefly looking up at the towering architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket crossing the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: ground-level retail spaces with large glass windows and colorful signage including El Coyote Cojo
massive modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade rising above the street
enclosed walkway connecting buildings high above the street level

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along a concrete sidewalk lined with commercial storefronts featuring neon trim and large advertisements. The camera briefly tilts up to admire the towering glass skyscrapers and overhead pedestrian bridges. Other pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, and the street continues with moderate traffic in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial walkway into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving through a green door frame, transitioning from the covered interior into a bright, open plaza dominated by a massive vertical holographic advertisement tower. As the camera reaches a wide urban intersection, it pauses at the curb where sharp shadows fall across yellow crosswalk stripes while a white sedan passes by. The view then tracks a sleek silver sports car and a gold sedan as they navigate the intersection, revealing elevated transit structures and towering glass buildings with digital billboards. Finally, the camera proceeds along a concrete sidewalk lined with neon-trimmed storefronts, tilting upward to take in the overhead pedestrian bridges and skyscrapers before continuing past other pedestrians.
